hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

surface_styles.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
surface_styles.card_default: bg-[#111111] border border-[#27272A] rounded-xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300

components.primary_button: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#FBBF24] transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]
components.secondary_button: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 transition-colors

course_card.container: group flex flex-col bg-[#111111] border border-[#27272A] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-all duration-300

components.input_field: bg-[#050505] border border-[#27272A] focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] text-white rounded-lg p-3 w-full

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D flowing gold and black luxury texture for main hero area background

student_learning.description: Student working on laptop for About Us or Reviews section

course_web_dev.description: Dark mode code screen for WordPress/Web Dev course

course_ecommerce.description: Packaging box on table for Shopify / Amazon FBA course

course_design.description: Graphic designer working on tablet for Graphic Design course

course_marketing.description: Laptop showing social media presentation for Marketing course

icons.style: Clean, minimal, high-contrast, usually rendered in #D4AF37 or #FFFFFF based on hierarchy

animations.hover: Subtle 1px upward translation `-translate-y-1` and addition of gold ambient shadow on cards
animations.entrance: Framer motion staggered fade-up for lists and course grids

home.hero: Full height 100vh. Dark gradient overlay (`bg-black/60 to bg-[#050505]`) on top of hero abstract image. Headline centered or left-aligned with glowing gold text highlights.
home.benefits: Bento grid mode. Mix of large cards (span 8) and small cards (span 4). Dark surfaces, gold borders.

student_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (dark) + main content area. 'Control Room' grid pattern for metrics (courses in progress, hours learned). Video player must use 16:9 ratio with dark theater mode.

authentication.style: Glassmorphism card centered on screen with deep dark background. Include Google Social Login button matching the dark theme.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling based on the provided JSON variables.
Implement Shadcn UI for dropdowns, dialogues, and form inputs (Input, Form, Checkbox), customizing them to fit the dark/gold theme.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Manrope for body text. Make sure to import these fonts.
Ensure all pages are fully responsive. Limit image heights to 80vh on mobile.
Do NOT use pure #000000; use #050505 for base and #111111 for cards.
Implement data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) as per the design rules.
Create the specific student dashboard routes (/dashboard, /courses) with dummy video embed wrappers.
Implement basic mockup UI for payment methods (JazzCash, EasyPaisa, Bank Transfer) in the checkout flow.
Ensure the design remains luxurious and does not feel like a generic SaaS template.
